claim: This source kit is not an account backend, authorization boundary, notification service, security console, destructive-operation service, Stable release, or distribution-parity claim.

semantics.nativeBasis: Native form and navigation composed with canonical Button, Field, and Input controls.
semantics.rolePolicy: Save failures are alerts, successful saves are statuses, and instance-scoped unsaved-change alertdialogs or destructive reviews exist only when enabled; closing an unsaved prompt restores focus to its navigation trigger.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through section navigation, rendered controls, save/reset, and optional review controls in document order.
Submits the current valid native section form.
Restores rendered native fields and clears component-owned dirty, status, prompt, and review state when mutable; read-only mode disables and cancels reset without callbacks or mutation.

nonColor: Current section, dirty, saved, failed, pending, and destructive states include text, native state, headings, and confirmation requirements.
responsive: Section navigation becomes a labelled horizontal strip on narrow screens while content remains a single intrinsic column with logical RTL geometry.
consumerResponsibilities: Render labelled public controls and authorize, validate, persist, audit, and recover every settings and account operation on secured services.
Keep dirty state accurate when custom controls change and provide explicit migration when stored setting semantics change.
Localize all content and complete security, privacy, legal, notification, destructive-operation, browser, device, and assistive-technology review.
